modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: User access issue in Mission Based Management (MBM) department.

full_description_text: 
A user is requesting access to a specific department within Mission Based Management (MBM). There is a concern that an individual currently has access to the MBM database, despite not being authorized. This situation needs to be addressed to ensure proper access control within the system.

There is a concern that an individual currently has access to the MBM database, despite not being authorized. This situation needs to be addressed to ensure proper access control within the system.
